signals.headline: MAGA Supporters Turning on Trump on Truth Social After US-Iran Ceasefire | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
MAGA Supporters Turning on Trump on Truth Social After US-Iran Ceasefire | NO | LOW confidence**

A New York Times analysis of 40,000 Truth Social posts, reported in a press review on April 10, 2026, shows die-hard MAGA supporters openly criticizing Donald Trump for his "war on Iran" following a fragile two-week US-Iran ceasefire signed around April 9, 2026[1]. signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY, Below Forecasts of 2.3-2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's annual CPI inflation rose to **2.2%** in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, driven by oil prices but contained by government fuel caps and food vouchers, missing market consensus of 2.3% [1][2][3]. Monthly CPI increased 0.3%, below expectations of 0.6% [1][3]. Core inflation (ex-

signals.headline: ETH Hits $6K on Pectra Upgrade Final Testing & Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**[4]
signals.raw:
ETH Hits $6K on Pectra Upgrade Final Testing & Record ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**[4]

Ethereum's price has surged to $6,000 as of April 18, 2026, driven by confirmation of the **Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade** entering its final testing phase, boosting wallet abstraction and validator efficiency[4].
